title: drosanthemum pruinosum
intro: Drosanthemum pruinosum, also known as the woolly daisy, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. Traditionally, Drosanthemum pruinosum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Drosanthemum pruinosum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
